docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-18-2014 - PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM ORDERED ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 504 FOR TRIAL. BOTH SIDES PRESENT. ANGELIKA LEWIS, WITNESS FOR DEFENDANT IS PRESENT. WITNESSES AFFIRMED AND EXAMINED. DEFENDANT'S DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE IS INTRODUCED. THE MATTER IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION BY JUDGE PETER J. BUSCH. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

SMALL CLAIMS CLAIM CALENDAR OF JUL-28-2014 TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT - PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF JUL-28-2014 - SMALL CLAIMS, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM CONTINUED TO AUG-18-2014 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. (206)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTIN, BENNY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FOSTER, WARREN $100.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $175.00, ALTHOUGH DEFENDANT HIT PLAINTIFF ONCE, PLAINTIFF DID NOT PROVE DAMAGES BEYOND VERY MINOR PAIN AND SUFFERING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

WITNESSES AFFIRMED AND EXAMINED. DEFENDANT'S DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE IS INTRODUCED. THE MATTER IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION BY JUDGE PETER J. BUSCH. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT FOSTER, WARREN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT MARTIN, BENNY CROSS-COMPLAINANT DID NOT PROVE ANY WRONGFUL, NON-PRIVILEGED CONDUCT BY CROSS-DEFENDANT, NOR ANY RECOVERABLE DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
